name: Jiffy Cinnamon Buns
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cold margarine, cut into pieces
Enough water to make a thin mixture
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Cut in the cold margarine until crumbly.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients. Pour in milk and stir with a fork to form a dough, adding more milk if needed.
3. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead 8-10 times.
4. Roll into a rectangle.
5. Filling:
- Cream margarine, brown sugar, and cinnamon together well.
- Spoon 1 teaspoon of the mixture into each of 12 muffin tins.
- Spread the remaining filling over the dough.
- Sprinkle raisins evenly over the top.
- Roll up as a jelly roll. Place in a greased baking dish.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Glaze:
- Mix icing sugar with enough water to make a thin glaze.
- Drizzle over the baked buns.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
